title: Agent Fleet Monitor
description: Monitor a fleet of AI agent wallets for health, balances, and activity — poll multiple wallets in parallel and flag any with low gas balance or unusual recent activity.
useCase: Build a fleet health dashboard for autonomous agents — monitor gas balances, flag wallets that need refuelling, and surface any unusual on-chain activity across a set of agent addresses.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain the agents operate on
keyParams.walletAddresses: Array of agent wallet addresses to monitor
